{{Quote|Many things going on in sector, not seen by bigs, but sometimes bigs forget to see little things around them.|[[Kaalah-Nah]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
The '''Entertainment Promenade''', which was located in the [[Refugee Sector]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], had two major rooms: a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and a [[Pazaak Den]].

==History==
The [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] may have played [[Pazaak/Legends|Pazaak]] in the Pazaak Den. In the cantina, the Exile purchased [[Juma juice/Legends|Juma Juice]] to knock out [[Vogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Kath hound/Legends|kath hounds]]. She also met with Vogga the Hutt's [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]], who asked her to dance for Vogga. She accepted his offer and was taken to dance for Vogga. [[Atton Rand]] went to the Entertainment Promenade to relax, but was attacked by the [[Twin Suns (assassins)|Twin Suns]], whom he knocked out.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
